strataLayers.name: Surface Crust
strataLayers.description: Stabilize the loose crust to focus the fall.

strataLayers.name: Basalt Vein
strataLayers.description: Dense basalt channels powders into tighter streams.

strataLayers.name: Shimmer Cavern
strataLayers.description: Glittering caverns hum with resonant dust currents.

strataLayers.name: Aether Mantle
strataLayers.description: Liquid aether bends gravity toward your funnels.

strataLayers.name: Stellar Spire
strataLayers.description: A needle of stardust concentrates every grain that falls.

strataLayers.name: Chrono Abyss
strataLayers.description: Time coils inward, dragging matter toward the crucible.

milestones.name: Artisan's Rhythm
milestones.description: Unlock auto dropper toggles to keep the jar raining.

milestones.name: Gravity Pulse
milestones.description: Amplify the pull within the jar for faster settling.

milestones.name: Dust Bloom
milestones.description: Crystallize stray grains into useful dust.

milestones.name: Chronicle of Echoes
milestones.description: Record your discoveries to unlock the codex.

milestones.name: Core Forge
milestones.description: Channel singularity cores to enrich future cores.
